results.justification: EXACT TWIN — MoE 256-expert dynamic-routing + sparse fine-grained gating IS the K-chorus fixed-pattern bank + final-syllable content-gate selection mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — router-decoupled MoE with pre-gating IS the lead-LLM-emitting-gate-signal-for-K-chorus mechanism.
Mixture of in-context experts + long-context awareness overlaps with K-chorus fixed-pattern context-bank selection.
EXACT TWIN — SinkTrack BOS information-anchor + training-free + plug-and-play IS the torro low-frequency anchor third-channel mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — head-specific sigmoid gate post-SDPA + attention-sink-free + non-linearity IS the final-syllable content-gate mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — StreamingLLM attention-sink initial-token anchor + recent-token retention IS the torro low-frequency anchor mechanism.
Cascade-routing framework + routing-vs-cascading + theoretically optimal selection overlaps with lead-LLM content-gate routing to K-chorus.
EXACT TWIN — Qwen3 attention-gating + SiLU/sigmoid + input-dependent sparsity IS the final-syllable content-gate + K-chorus activation mechanism.
